test case id: tc-jobs-002 title: validate job batch management module: jobs source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: test steps: 1. create a job batch. 2. add jobs to the batch. 3. execute the batch. 4. verify all jobs in the batch are completed. expected result: all jobs in the batch should complete successfully.

test case id: tc-matching-process-001 title: validate matching process between two users module: matching source pages: 7 preconditions: two users are registered and have profiles. test data: user 1: profile1, user 2: profile2 test steps: 1. user 2 swipes right on user 1's profile. 2. verify the server saves the preference in the database. 3. user 1 swipes right on user 2's profile. 4. verify the server saves the preference in the database. 5. verify the server checks for a match. 6. verify the server notifies user 1 of a match and opens the chat. 7. verify the application displays the match screen for both users. expected result: both users should be notified of a match and see the match screen.
